steps.title: Apply the method comparison
steps.content: The researcher argues that GPS records higher travel distances than RTD because GPS tracks all movement while RTD doubles only the distance between two habitats. The example must show a GPS value exceeding the corresponding RTD value.

steps.title: Use the caribou comparison
steps.content: A contradicts the claim by making a GPS value lower, C compares to an unrelated lower threshold, and D makes an unsupported claim about Tibetan antelope exceeding the caribou GPS value. The table supports RTD being lower than the caribou's 4,868-kilometer GPS distance. The answer is B.
